title: Christening Gift My First Curl / Tooth & Frame It's A Boy
features: It's A Boy Christening Gift Photo Frame/My First Curl / Tooth
Keepsake gift set with photo frame and 1st tooth & 1st curl boxes
Photo frame holds a 5cm x7.5cm (2in x 3in) photo
Displayed in a presentation gift box
Ideal gift for a new baby or a Christening gift
description: 2" x 3" - It's A Boy Photo Frame - First Tooth & Curl Boxes A beautiful celebrations photo frame and first tooth and first curl set. The frame measures 2" x 3" and is embellished with an adorable blue bow under the insert and 'it's a boy' along the top. The keepsake boxes are embellished with a pram and rattle motif and can be personalised across the banner on the lids. This sentimental and touching gift is complemented with attractive, satin lined packaging. Designed here in the uk, it is built to cover every one of life’s precious moments and occasions providing great quality, functional and uplifting gifts and keepsakes at an affordable price point. Designed with subtle branding to instead focus on the occasion, celebrations is a one stop shop for the price conscious but generous consumers of this generation. Size: H x 160 W x 205 D x 35
